title: Fluffy Fiery Saudi Bread Flatbread
description: A tangy, comforting flatbread with a spicy kick, made with a fermented starter and chili powder for a unique Saudi twist.
instructions: In a bowl combine the flour, salt, sugar, chili powder, and baking powder.
In a separate container whisk the water, olive oil, and sourdough starter until fully blended.
Add the yeast to the wet mixture and stir until it dissolves.
Pour the wet mixture into the dry ingredients and stir until a shaggy dough forms.
Knead the dough on a lightly floured surface for 8 to 10 minutes until smooth and elastic.
Shape the dough into a bowl, cover with a damp cloth, and let it rise at room temperature for 2 hours or until doubled in size.
Punch down the dough, divide it into four equal portions, and roll each into a 1 cm thick disc.
Heat a non‑stick skillet over medium‑high heat and cook each disc 2 to 3 minutes per side until golden brown and puffed.
